display.purpose: Hero and major section headings only.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, lists, tags, and all data blocks.

motion.name: ease-out-exponential
motion.purpose: Tactile scale transitions, menu toggles, and reveal timings.

narrative.overview: This visual system features high-contrast layouts, fine lines, structural typography, and strict spacing constraints. It uses monospaced elements for structured data and a serif style for headings.
keyCharacteristics: Serif display headers matched with monospace body typography

rules.name: The Single-Accent Rule
rules.body: Only the accent color (emerald/neon green) is used for visual highlights. No other colored accents are permitted.

rules.name: The Shadow Prohibition
rules.body: Box shadows are not allowed on cards or standard containers. Spacing and thin borders are the sole dividers of sections.

dos: Do keep text alignments aligned to structural grid margins.
donts: Don't apply round corners with radius > 8px.
Don't use box-shadow with blur > 8px alongside a border.
